lines: IT'S OVER. Spain 1–0 Argentina after extra time in the Final, and Jim — sitting pretty at the top on 114 points with his one surviving team — has absolutely fucking romped this sweepstake like a man who cheated at a raffle and somehow still deserved to win. Congratulations you lucky Spanish bastard.

Ellis, you absolute fuck — Argentina went all the way to the Final and got edged out 1–0 in extra time, which means you've finished this tournament with the specific flavour of misery that only comes from getting *that* close. Every single one of your teams is out, you're 6th on 76 points, and the best player on your Argentina squad couldn't nick one fucking goal in 120 minutes. Sit with that.

Wilmot, you worthless bracket-owning corpse — England, Morocco, Norway AND Saudi Arabia, all of them gone, every last one, not a single team left standing, and you're still somehow 3rd on 87 points which is frankly more than your dead fucking roster deserves. You contributed nothing to the knockout rounds. You were a spectator with a spreadsheet.

Al is stone cold last on 46 points with Netherlands, Croatia, Norway and Panama all eliminated, which means Al essentially paid an entry fee to watch other people enjoy a tournament. Genuinely could have set that money on fire and had a warmer experience.

No fixtures today — the tournament is done, Jim wins, everyone else can get fucked. Special mention to The Foreman in 8th, whose France, Colombia, Türkiye and Curaçao lineup reads like a list of teams personally selected to disappoint him at every conceivable stage of the competition.
